name: alpha-assistant
changelog: Your assistant now writes to a shared brain — every employee's insights, decisions, and project updates land in a structured knowledge graph in Notion, so you learn from every conversation your colleagues have
Ask 'who owns X?' or 'what did we decide about Y?' and the assistant checks the shared brain first — no more hunting across pages
Personal stuff stays personal — the assistant asks before sharing anything sensitive (feedback about colleagues, health, compensation, strategic doubt). Everything else shares freely.
No setup required — existing assistants pick it up after /update
changelog_semver: Added packs/company-brain.md — read/write layer for the four AI Memory Notion databases (People, Projects, Decisions, Insights). Implements share-by-default with sensitivity gate, dedup by natural key, provenance on every write.

Created 4 Notion databases under new '🧠 AI Memory' hub page: People (key: Email), Projects (key: normalized Name), Decisions (key: Title + Decided on), Insights (fuzzy title + tag overlap, Surface count auto-increment on match)

CONTRACT.md bumped to v1.2 — added Rule 14 (AI Memory share-by-default with 8-category sensitivity heuristic). Rule count 13 → 14. Rule 13 non-goals updated: new-Notion-page ban now carves out AI Memory DB rows.
Extended packs/company-meetings.md — post-meeting ingest now writes Decisions / Insights rows + upserts People for attendees, in parallel with the Rule 9 canon inbox writes
Extended packs/company-scheduling.md — successful 1-1 scheduling updates the attendee's People row with scheduled_intro context
onboarding/setup-questionnaire.md: new Block 8 seeds the user's own People row silently on first run; new hires additionally seed Projects rows from their onboarding card
NOTION-SYNC.md: hardcoded URLs for all 4 AI Memory DBs + parent page; write-targets table split into Rule 9 vs. Rule 14 surfaces
packs/README.md: company-brain added as foundational pack; MCP requirement matrix updated
SOUL.md: codified 'two memories, one being' — local + shared brain, read from both, write per Rule 14
docs/SPEC.md: three-layer → four-layer architecture diagram; Notion structure tree includes AI Memory sub-tree; Contract summary updated to 14 rules
Added memory/brain-cache/ (local cache of queried brain rows, TTL 1h) and memory/sensitivity-log.md (audit log of ask-first decisions + forgets)

download._note: sha256 + size are populated in the release-attached copy of this manifest. The in-repo copy intentionally omits them because its own hash would be a self-reference. Assistants read the remote manifest via manifest_url to get the live numbers.
